title: clematis roylei var. patens
intro: Clematis roylei var. patens is a flowering plant, also known as Himalayan Clematis, belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis roylei var. patens are said to include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as other conditions like fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusion or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
